description: Develop custom web applications and websites for clients using modern technologies. Focus on creating responsive, accessible, and performant user interfaces.
Assisted in the development of client websites and web applications. Gained hands-on experience with front-end technologies and industry best practices.
Provided comprehensive virtual assistance while supporting web operations. Managed customer communications and performed basic Shopify customizations.
Provided technical support for web platforms and digital tools by troubleshooting issues, guiding users, and escalating complex incidents to developers.
